activity_1_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වචන නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_1_d.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_1_e.text:
Read along.
පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න.
ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

content.sentence_text: The 'b'ushing may reduce vibration during suspension movement under load.
The wheel 'b'alancer may detect imbalance at higher rotation speeds.
The 'b'ackplate might crack after repeated braking cycles at temperatures.
The 'b'ead breaker might slip if hydraulic pressure drops suddenly.

example.text:
Listen to the model dialogues.
ආදර්ශ සංවාදවලට සවන් දෙන්න.
மாதிரி உரையாடல்களை கேளுங்கள்.

activity_2_a.text:
Match the words with the pictures.
පින්තූර සමඟ වචන ගලපන්න.
சொற்களைப் படங்களுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_2_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_2_d.text:
Read along.

ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

activity_2_e.text:
Listen to each question, use the pause to answer it, then compare your response with the model answer.
සෑම ප්‍රශ්නයකටම සවන් දෙන්න, පිළිතුරු දීමට විරාමය භාවිතා කරන්න, ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර ආදර්ශ පිළිතුර සමඟ සසඳන්න.
ஒவ்வொரு கேள்வியையும் கவனமாகக் கேட்டு, இடைநிறுத்தத்தின் போது பதிலளிக்கவும், அதன் பிறகு உங்கள் பதிலை மாதிரிப் பதிலுடன் ஒப்பிட்டுப் பார்க்கவும்.

example_dialogues.text_a: Do you know why the engine is making an unusual noise today?
example_dialogues.text_b: I’m not sure. It may be because the oil level is low, or it might be because a component is worn. We will only know for sure if we inspect the engine.

example_dialogues.text_a: Do you know why the vehicle failed to start this morning?
example_dialogues.text_b: I’m not sure. It may be a weak battery, or it might be a loose terminal connection. We will only know for sure if we check the electrical system.

example_dialogues.text_a: Do you know why the brake pedal feels soft?
example_dialogues.text_b: I’m not sure. It may be air in the brake lines, or it might be a fluid leak. We will only know for sure if we bleed the brakes.

keywords.word: exhaust smoke looks darker than usual
warning light stays on after starting the engine

dialogues.text_a: Do you know why the engine temperature is rising quickly?
dialogues.text_b: I’m not sure. It may be a cooling fan problem, or it might be a blocked radiator. We will only know for sure if we inspect the cooling system.

dialogues.text_a: Do you know why the headlights look dim?
dialogues.text_b: I’m not sure. It may be a low charging voltage, or it might be a poor ground connection. We will only know for sure if we test the circuit.

dialogues.text_a: Do you know why the clutch is slipping during acceleration?
dialogues.text_b: I’m not sure. It may be a worn clutch plate, or it might be oil contamination. We will only know for sure if we remove and inspect the clutch.

dialogues.text_a: Do you know why the exhaust smoke looks darker than usual?
dialogues.text_b: I’m not sure. It may be incomplete combustion, or it might be a clogged air filter. We will only know for sure if we check the intake system.

dialogues.text_a: Do you know why the warning light stays on after starting the engine?
dialogues.text_b: I’m not sure. It may be a sensor fault, or it might be a stored error code. We will only know for sure if we scan the control unit.

dialogues.text_a: Do you know why the fuel consumption is high?
dialogues.text_b: I’m not sure. It may be incorrect tyre pressure, or it might be poor engine tuning. We will only know for sure if we carry out a full inspection.

activity_a.text:
Choose the correct answer.
 නිවැරදි පිළිතුර තෝරන්න.
 சரியான பதிலைத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்.

activity_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

examples.sentence: The bus from Kurunegala _____ arrive late because there is heavy traffic near the town.

content.sentence: It _____ rain this afternoon as dark clouds are forming over Kandy.
You __________ share your bank password with anyone.
The power supply _____ go off tonight due to maintenance work in the area.
I _______ hear you. There is so much noise in here.
The train to Galle _____ be delayed because of signal problems on the line.
Some students _____ miss the first period since the CTB buses are running slowly this morning.
The price of rice _____ increase next month because of transport issues after the floods.
You ______________ leave important work until the last minute.
You _____________ cross the road when the light is red.
The meeting _____ be cancelled if several staff members are unable to attend.

activity_b.text: The bus from Kurunegala may arrive late because there is heavy traffic near the town.
It might rain this afternoon as dark clouds are forming over Kandy.
You mustn’t share your bank password with anyone.
The power supply may go off tonight due to maintenance work in the area.
I can’t hear you. There is so much noise in here.
The train to Galle might be delayed because of signal problems on the line.
Some students may miss the first period since the CTB buses are running slowly this morning.
The price of rice might increase next month because of transport issues after the floods.
You shouldn’t leave important work until the last minute.
You mustn’t cross the road when the light is red.
The meeting may be cancelled if several staff members are unable to attend.

activity_a.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

activity_b.text:
Listen.
கேளுங்கள்.
සවන් දෙන්න.

activity_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_d.text: Read along. පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න. ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

Questions.question: What must students do before entering the glass processing unit?
Questions.answer: Put on safety goggles and gloves
options: Put on safety goggles and gloves

Questions.question: Where should students keep their bags and personal items?
options: In the storage area next to the shower area

Questions.question: When are students allowed to touch machines?
options: When the machines are switched off

Questions.question: What should students do if they hear an alarm?
What must students do after the tour is finished?
Questions.answer: Return the safety equipment and wait
options: Return the safety equipment and wait
Use their phones inside the unit

activity_b.text: Alright, everyone, before we enter the glass processing unit, please listen carefully.
First, put on your safety goggles and protective gloves.
Make sure your shoes are fully covered.
Open footwear is not allowed.
Keep your bags and personal items in the storage area provided.
Sorry, could you repeat that?
Did you say we have to leave our bags outside?
Yes, that’s right.
All bags and personal items stay outside.
Once we enter the unit, stay with the group at all times and follow the marked walkways.
Do not touch any glass sheets, tools, or machines unless you are told to do so.
I’m not sure I understood it correctly.
Are we allowed to touch the machines if they are switched off?
No.
Do not touch anything unless I give you permission.
Be careful near the cutting and grinding areas.
Broken glass may be on the floor, so walk slowly and watch where you step.
You mustn’t step over safety barriers or warning lines.
Did you say we mustn’t cross the warning lines at all?
That’s correct.
Never cross them.
Sharp edges can cause serious cuts, so keep a safe distance from all workstations.
Also remember, hot glass may look cool, but it can still burn you.
Sorry, could you repeat that last part about the glass?
Yes.
Even if glass looks cool, it may still be hot.
You can’t use your phone inside the processing area because distractions are dangerous.
If you hear an alarm, stop immediately and wait for instructions.
Did you say we can’t use our phones at all?
Not inside the unit.
You can use them later, after we leave.
If you don’t understand an instruction, ask before moving forward.
Never guess what to do in this area.
If you can’t hear clearly because of machine noise, let me know and I will repeat it.
Okay.
And after the tour?
After the tour is finished, return your safety equipment at the collection point.
Then wait in the designated area until everyone is accounted for.
Do not leave the unit until you are told it is safe to do so.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට මෙම පියවර ඔබට උපකාරී වනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:
Watch the video 2 times.
මේ වීඩියෝ එක දෙවරක් බලන්න.
வீடியோவை இரண்டு முறைப் பாருங்கள்.

Learn new words using Google Translate.
Google පරිවර්තකය භාවිතයෙන් නව වචන ඉගෙන ගන්න.
கூகுள் ட்ரான்ஸ்லேட் பயன்படுத்தி புதிய சொற்களைக் கற்றுக்கொள்ளுங்கள்.
